captures.caption: A hit no longer ends the game — it costs a life. The counter in the top-right ticks from 3 to 2, the ship reappears at the bottom, and play carries on.
captures.alt: The ship flies into an enemy and is hit; the lives count in the top-right drops from 3 to 2, the ship reappears at the bottom of the screen, and the wave keeps descending.

captures.caption: Each hit spends a life — 3, 2, 1 — and only when the last one is gone does the game end: the ship stays red and GAME OVER returns.
captures.alt: The ship is hit repeatedly, the lives counter counting down from 3 to 0; on the final hit the ship turns red, freezes, and the GAME OVER message appears.
